name: Crocked Kielbasa
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Can pitted black olives (drained and left whole)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté the ground beef until browned.
2. Transfer the browned meat to the crockpot.
3. Add all other ingredients except pasta and Parmesan cheese to the crockpot.
4. Simmer on low for 6-8 hours.
5. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
6. Ladle the Crocked Kielbasa over the cooked pasta in large bowls.
7. Pass the grated Parmesan cheese for garnish.
